name: @xiigen/user-registration
description: FLOW-01 user-registration — email-based intake, uniqueness verification, credential hashing, idempotent account creation, email verification, and onboarding-material delivery (T47-T49). Portability artifact declaring cross-flow co-install relationships.
coInstallNotes: FLOW-01 stands alone for its 3 services (T47-T49). Downstream flows (FLOW-02, FLOW-08, FLOW-48) consume FLOW-01 events but are NOT required for FLOW-01 to boot — emission is via the queue fabric, fire-and-forget. The reverse relationship (FLOW-01 requires FLOW-02/FLOW-08/FLOW-48) does NOT exist. Circular co-install runtime test: server/test/user-registration/phase-01-circular-install.spec.ts proves FLOW-01 services boot standalone without any downstream consumer present (V-12 gate).
